key_events: Indian markets rebounded amid geopolitical de-escalation hopes (postponement of US strikes)
US markets closed up >1% on March 23; global indices showing recovery
Oil prices remain volatile; gold/silver prices declined due to perceived stability

key_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, driven by high-end sales
US remains leading market (44% of global sales, $26B, +5% YoY)
Strong demand for established artists and Impressionist/Modern segments; recovery noted
